title: The Ending of Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: The Ending of Rebuild Post by BGMLV » Sat Jan 16, 2010 11:57 am Do you think they are going to do it again with the End of Evangelion ending or not. If they do so, what would be your reactions?

[]: Post by Mad » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:00 pm 4.0 is supposed to be completely different from previous Eva works. So no. I would feel like I got the shaft if they rehashed the ending of EoE.

[]: Post by Napul » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:13 pm Never again, I want Shinji x Rei End!

[]: Post by Mad » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:31 pm I'm pretty sure this isn't the correct place to discuss pairings

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jan 16, 2010 1:14 pm Pfft, at this point Rebuild is nothing BUT pairings.

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Jan 16, 2010 1:57 pm ukulelembo wrote:

[]: Post by Mad » Sat Jan 16, 2010 2:05 pm SaltyJoe wrote: ukulelembo wrote:

[]: Post by Ornette » Sat Jan 16, 2010 5:10 pm SaltyJoe wrote: And don't we already have a million "How do you think it will end?" threads?
